title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at VRL Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at VRL Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the VRL Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
